headline: AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) Up 21.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Axon Enterprise Weighs Motorola Counter Drone Deal For Public Safety Future
summary: Motorola Solutions recently agreed to acquire counter-drone specialist D-Fend Solutions, expanding its presence in drone security and public safety technology. This move places Motorola Solutions in more direct competition with Axon Enterprise (NasdaqGS:AXON) in areas such as integrated drone responses and airspace protection tools for law enforcement and critical infrastructure. Axon Enterprise is best known for its conducted energy devices and body cameras, but the company also invests in...
